text.title: niche-evaluation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for niche-evaluation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent scores accessibility 4-5 for any niche with a Reddit subreddit, regardless of engagement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Subreddit existence is not a signal of buyer concentration. Many subreddits are low-activity communities of casual interest, not decision-makers with purchasing authority.
